close_reason: Wontfix: tss-esapi doesn't re-export picky types; direct deps required; Cargo unifies identical versions
description: secretx-tpm2 Cargo.toml lists picky-asn1-der = "0.5" and picky-asn1-x509 = "0.15" as direct dependencies. These exact versions are also pulled in transitively by tss-esapi 7.7.0. The direct deps pin to the same major versions but carry a maintenance risk: if tss-esapi bumps its picky-asn1 deps in a semver-compatible release, secretx-tpm2 could end up with two incompatible versions of picky-asn1-x509 in the dependency tree, causing SubjectPublicKeyInfo type mismatches at compile time. Consider: (1) re-exporting via tss-esapi if it exposes the conversion, or (2) adding a comment documenting that the versions must stay synchronized with tss-esapi's deps.
title: picky-asn1-der/picky-asn1-x509 are direct deps duplicating tss-esapi
